type.description: Type is a machine-readable identifier, e.g. "Ready", "Phase".

status.description: Status is one of True, False, Unknown.

lastHeartbeatTime.description: LastHeartbeatTime is when this condition was last sampled.

lastTransitionTime.description: LastTransitionTime is when the Status last changed.

reason.description: Reason is a CamelCase word summarising why the condition has this status.

Condition.description: Condition describes a single observable aspect of a resource's state.

EnvVar.description: EnvVar is a single environment variable to inject into a container.

IngressAccess.description: IngressAccess defines visibility and auth rules for an ingress endpoint.

IngressDef.description: IngressDef describes a single HTTP ingress rule for a Project.

IngressScope.description: Controls whether a route is exposed to the public internet or only to the Headscale overlay network.

IngressTarget.description: IngressTarget is the backend service and port for an ingress rule.

name.description: Name is the unique identifier within its Kind namespace.

labels.description: Labels are arbitrary key/value pairs used for selection and grouping.

annotations.description: Annotations are non-identifying metadata (e.g. human-readable hints).

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is set by the server on first write.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is set by the server on every write.

ObjectMeta.description: ObjectMeta holds identity and classification metadata common to all resources.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion identifies the versioned schema this resource conforms to, e.g. "caravanserai/v1".

kind.description: Kind is the resource type, e.g. "Node", "Project".

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Project is the central workload resource.

ProjectPhase.description: Lifecycle state of a Project as maintained by the Controller Manager.

services.description: Services is the ordered list of containers to run.

volumes.description: Volumes are named storage units shared across services.

ingress.description: Ingress defines public or internal HTTP routing rules.

expireAt.description:
ExpireAt, when set, causes the GC controller to delete the Project
after this time. Useful for ephemeral preview environments.

ProjectSpec.description: ProjectSpec is the desired state declared by the user.

phase.description: Phase is the high-level lifecycle state.

nodeRef.description: NodeRef is the name of the Node the Scheduler chose. Empty while Pending.

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of granular observable states.

ProjectStatus.description: ProjectStatus is written by the Controller Manager and Agent.

name.description:
Name identifies the service within the Project (used as the DNS
hostname inside the shared bridge network).

image.description: Image is the Docker image reference, e.g. "postgres:15".

env.description: Env are extra environment variables injected at runtime.

volumeMounts.description: VolumeMounts lists volumes to attach to this container.

ServiceDef.description: ServiceDef describes a single container (analogous to a Compose service).

type.description: Type determines lifecycle and backup semantics.

VolumeDef.description: VolumeDef describes a named volume used by one or more services.

VolumeMount.description: VolumeMount associates a named Volume with a container mount path.

VolumeType.description: Governs the lifecycle and backup behaviour of a Volume.
